### 1. Add the Dependency to `Cargo.toml`

Open your `Cargo.toml` file and add the following under `[dependencies]`:

```toml
[dependencies]
numeric-eigenvalues = "0.1"
```

> ⚠️ Note: As of now, `numeric-eigenvalues` is not a widely adopted or officially maintained crate on crates.io. You may need to check if it exists or if you meant a different crate
